/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Floor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o app  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3
